items.title: Trump admin asks Supreme Court to end temporary protected status for Syrian migrants
items.description: In a new filing, the Trump administration is requesting that the Supreme Court intervene so that DHS Secretary Kristi Noem can end TPS for Syrians.

items.title: Dem governor doubles down on transgender protections after Trump State of the Union
items.description: Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer vows to veto anti-LGBTQ legislation, directly challenging Trump's push to ban minors' gender transitions nationwide.

items.title: GOP pushes to hold sanctuary jurisdictions’ ‘feet to the fire’ in state where Laken Riley was killed

items.title: FBI subpoena of phone records leaves Trump chief of staff 'in shock': report
items.description: White House chief of staff Susie Wiles reportedly "in shock" after learning FBI subpoenaed her phone records during Trump probe under Jack Smith.
